memoryArtifacts.headline: JOHN GLOVER (1435-1489) AND JOAN LUCAS (1435-1504):
memoryArtifacts.description: JOHN GLOVER was born about 1435 of Benenden, Kent, England, to James Glover (1414-1456) and Agnes Southwyn (1415-1456.) He married (1) Unknown; (2) *Joan Lucas about 1459 of Crotehole, Benenden, Kent, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Glover於1439年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親James Glover26歲，母親Agnes Southwyn24歲。他於1455年與Joan Lucas在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年6月6日在英國英格蘭肯特坦布利其 威爾斯享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Glover
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English glover, gloifer ‘glover; maker or seller of gloves’, a derivative of Old English glōf ‘glove’.

variants.name: Glovier
meanings: English (Worcestershire): variant of   Glover  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Glover was born in 1439, in Kent, England, his father, James Glover, was 26 and his mother, Agnes Southwyn, was 24. He married Joan Lucas in 1455, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 6 June 1489, in Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Glover est né en 1439, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, James Glover, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Southwyn, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Lucas en 1455, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 juin 1489, à Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. Juni 1489 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Joan Lucas nel 1455, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 giugno 1489, nel Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Gloverが1439年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父James Gloverは26歳，母Agnes Southwynは24歳であった。1455年にイギリスケントでJoan Lucasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年6月6日にイギリスイギリスケントトゥンブリッジ ウエルズで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Glover(이)가 1439년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Glover(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Southwyn(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1455년 영국 켄트에서 Joan Lucas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 6월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 툰브리지 웰스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Glover nasceu em 1439, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Glover, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Southwyn, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Lucas em 1455, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 6 de junho de 1489, em Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Glover родился в 1439 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени James Glover было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Southwyn, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Lucas в 1455 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 июня 1489 г. в местности тунбридж веллс, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
